title: A Pleasure Trip to the Beach
article_text: It is a great pleasure to visit the beach with my family. I have a suggestion for our trip: we should gather some flowers for a gift. The weather is critical for a good day at the beach. We mostly enjoy the sand and the sun. The earth feels warm under our feet. Pop music from a radio helps create a fun mood. Sunscreen is essential to protect our skin. I have a strong desire to swim in the sea. To promote our fun day, we take many photos. My father currently employs a new path to the beach. The topic of our conversation is the beautiful flowers. The beach always attracts many visitors. We engage in games and laugh a lot. The ocean is powerful and makes big waves. A crisis happens when we lose our bag. We use our strength to find it. We connect with other families who help us. The cultural scheme of the area is very interesting. We arrange our things and enjoy the day. This trip is a wonderful experience.

sentences.en: It is a great pleasure to visit the beach with my family.
sentences.zh: 和家人一起去海滩游玩是一种极大的乐趣。

words.eng_def: a feeling of happiness or enjoyment

sentences.zh: 我对我们的旅行有一个建议：我们应该采一些花作为礼物。

the part of a plant that is often colorful and has a smell

quiz.question_cn: “pleasure” 最接近的中文意思是什么？
quiz.question_en: What is the closest Chinese meaning of 'pleasure'?

quiz.question_cn: “critical” 在句子 “The weather is critical” 中的意思是什么？
quiz.question_en: What does 'critical' mean in the sentence 'The weather is critical'?
What is the best Chinese translation for 'essential'?

image_prompts: A family walking happily on a sunny beach, smiling and holding hands.
A person picking colorful flowers from a field near the beach.
A bright sky with clouds and a sun, with a family checking the weather on a phone.
Children playing in the sand and lying in the sun on a beach.
Feet standing on warm brown earth with small pebbles.
A portable radio playing pop music on a beach towel.
A hand applying sunscreen on a child's arm at the beach.
A person looking excitedly at the sea, ready to swim.
A person taking a photo of the beach with a camera.
A father walking on a new dirt path leading to the beach, with trees around.
